app.name: The Cursed Moon Store
app.about_comments: Software store for Arch-based distributions with pacman, Flatpak, and AUR support.
explore.title: Explore
explore.empty_desc: Find packages from system repos, Flathub, and the AUR.
installed.title: Installed
installed.empty_desc: Installed desktop apps from pacman, Flatpak, and AUR will appear here.
updates.title: Updates
updates.up_to_date_desc: No updates are available from enabled sources.
settings.title: Settings
settings.language_desc: Choose the interface language for The Cursed Moon Store.
settings.language_restart: Language updated. Some labels refresh immediately; reopen settings to see every change.
settings.updates_group_desc: How The Cursed Moon Store checks for new software.
settings.auto_updates_desc: While the store is open, periodically check for package updates
settings.bg_download_desc: Not available yet — preference is saved for a future release
settings.sources_group_desc: Toggle which repositories appear in Explore, Installed, and Updates.
advanced.warning: Advanced options can break package management. Edit carefully.
advanced.pacman_conf_desc: Leave empty for the system default
advanced.flatpak_desc: Installation scope and remotes (name|url per line).
advanced.aur_helper_desc: paru or yay — GUI installs use pkexec and skip PKGBUILD review
advanced.raw_group_desc: Free-form TOML merged into runtime for power users. Full store config is also editable below.
package.none_desc: Try another search or enable more sources in Settings.
about.comments: Software store for Arch-based distributions with pacman, Flatpak, and AUR support.
widgets.empty_desc: Try another search or enable more sources in Settings.
featured.empty_desc: Search above, or browse featured apps from Flathub.
featured.unavailable: Featured apps could not be loaded. Check your network or Flatpak source.
settings.visibility_group_desc: Choose whether non-application packages appear in Explore search and Installed.
settings.show_codecs_desc: Include multimedia codecs and related packages
settings.show_drivers_desc: Include graphics, firmware, and hardware drivers
settings.show_system_desc: Include libraries, runtimes, and other system software
advanced.install_group_desc: Choose which repository is preferred when the same app is available in more than one place.
advanced.install_priority_desc: Default order used for installs and search ranking
advanced.ask_repo_desc: When installing, ask which source to install from
detail.sources_desc: This application was found in the following sources.
detail.permissions_unknown: Permission details are not available for this package.
detail.report_bug_body: Describe the problem with {name}. We will open a message to the developer for you.
detail.report_bug_hint: Write what went wrong. Your text will be sent to the developer via email or their bug tracker.
detail.report_sent: Opening a message to the developer…
detail.report_copied_open: Report copied and developer page opened.
detail.report_failed: Could not contact the developer automatically.
detail.permissions_sandbox: Flatpak sandbox — limited filesystem/device access; exact permissions appear after install metadata is available.
advanced.saved_body: Your advanced settings were written to config.toml.
confirm.remove_body: Remove {name}? This cannot be undone from here.
confirm.update_all_body: All available updates from enabled sources will be applied. This may take a while and may require authentication.
advanced.raw_overlay_hint: Notes only for now — not applied at runtime. Prefer the full config.toml editor below.
perm.system_package: System package — full access to your user session and files once installed.
perm.aur_package: AUR package — built from community PKGBUILD; review before installing.
explore.truncated: Showing the first results only — refine your search for more specific matches.
